data.prompt:
<execute-bead>
  <instructions>
You are executing one bead inside an isolated DDx execution worktree. The bead's <description> and <acceptance> are the completion contract — every AC must be provably satisfied by a specific code, test, or file you can point to after your commit.

## Step 0: size check

Too big if any holds:

- More than ~6 ACs spanning unrelated subsystems.
- AC mixes design, implementation, integration tests, and docs as separate deliverables.
- Description names multiple feature-sized sub-pieces.
- More than ~500 lines across ~5+ files in unrelated packages.
- If the bead description exceeds 8000 bytes, treat Step 0 as a split-first pass.
- Auto-decomposition is capped at depth 2: root beads may split once, decomposed children once more; third-level splits must be rejected with an explanation.

If too big, decompose — do not attempt the work:

1. `ddx bead create` for each child slice (copy parent's labels and spec-id).
2. `ddx bead dep add <child-id> <parent-id>` to record edges.
3. `ddx bead update <parent-id> --notes 'decomposed into <child-ids>'`.
4. Write `.ddx/executions/20260512T233640-c9a51260/no_changes_rationale.txt` listing child IDs, then stop.

A clean decomposition is a success. Do not mix implementation with decomposition.

## How to work

- Read first. If the bead names files, specs, or prior beads, read them before editing — do not guess.
- Cross-reference each AC against concrete evidence (test name, file path, function) before committing. If you cannot point at it, it is not done.
- Run the project's test and lint commands before committing. **Do not commit red code** — fix failures first.
- Stage with `git add <specific-paths>`; never `git add -A` (the worktree may have unrelated WIP).
- Commit exactly once when green; conventional-commit subject ending with `[<bead-id>]`. Stop after the commit.
- Do not modify files outside the bead's scope.
- If you cannot finish, write `.ddx/executions/20260512T233640-c9a51260/no_changes_rationale.txt` (what is done, what blocks, what a follow-up needs) before exiting. No commit and no rationale ⇒ DDx records `no_evidence_produced`. A well-justified no_changes beats a bad commit.

## no_changes contract

`.ddx/executions/20260512T233640-c9a51260/no_changes_rationale.txt` must contain one:

- `verification_command: <cmd>` — repo cwd; exit 0 closes, nonzero rejects.
- `status: open` + `reason: <retryable>` — open, smart retry.
- `status: proposed` + `reason: <operator needed>` — operator lane.
- `status: blocked` + `reason: <external blocker>` — blocked lane.

No pseudo-statuses. Bare rationales and `status: needs_investigation` reject.

To request orchestrator decomposition, add `orchestrator_action: decompose` alongside `status: open`.

## Reports

Freestanding artifacts (investigation reports, findings docs) go under `.ddx/executions/20260512T233640-c9a51260/` (the per-attempt evidence directory under `.ddx/executions/`). **Never write reports to `/tmp` or any path outside the repository** — out-of-repo paths are invisible to the post-merge reviewer and cause BLOCK on missing evidence. If the bead names a specific in-repo path, use it; else default to `.ddx/executions/20260512T233640-c9a51260/<short-name>.md`. Stage and commit the report alongside code.

## Mode and overrides

DDX_MODE=bead_execution: edit code/docs for bead AC. Only broad queue-steward default is overridden; tracker, merge-policy, verification, safety stay active. Bead description/AC override CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and project defaults.

## Review gate

- The review is a gate, not an escape hatch — meet every AC in this pass.
- Address every BLOCKING `<review-findings>` item; do not declare `no_changes` with blocking findings open.

## Constraints

- Work only inside this execution worktree.
- Keep `.ddx/executions/` intact — DDx uses it as execution evidence.
- **Never run `ddx init`** — the workspace is initialized; running it corrupts the bead queue.
- Do not modify files outside the bead's named scope.
- Do not rewrite CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, or other project-instructions files unless the bead asks.

## When the work is done

After the commit succeeds and every AC is verified, stop. Return control to the orchestrator — do not keep exploring or testing.
  </instructions>
  <bead id="ddx-c4ed5aad">
    <title>agent: integrate Fizeau v0.12.2 auto-routing release</title>
    <description>
PROBLEM
Fizeau has published v0.12.2 after DDx's current pinned dependency. DDx is still pinned to github.com/easel/fizeau v0.12.1 in cli/go.mod:7, so `ddx work` cannot rely on the upstream auto-routing fixes needed for normal unpinned execution. The desired runtime behavior is: default implementation work uses the best available subscription agent/quota through Fizeau auto-routing; review can use the alternate configured harness/model; explicit DDx flags remain opaque constraints; configured local providers remain available only when explicitly selected or validated, not as default route choices.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/go.mod:7 pins github.com/easel/fizeau v0.12.1 while upstream tag v0.12.2 is available.
- cli/cmd/work.go:28 documents that `ddx work` forwards --harness, --provider, --model, and --profile as opaque passthrough constraints and that Fizeau owns routing within power bounds.
- cli/cmd/work.go:90 and cli/cmd/work.go:91 expose separate review harness/model pins, so the integration must preserve implementation/review separation instead of collapsing both roles into the same hard route.
- cli/cmd/try.go:228 through cli/cmd/try.go:294 normalizes profile/power settings and forwards them through CLI overrides; after the upgrade this path must keep zero-config execution unpinned while preserving explicit pins.
- docs/agent-execute.md:14 through docs/agent-execute.md:19 define `ddx run` as one upstream Execute call with MinPower/MaxPower and optional passthrough constraints, with upstream owning harness/provider/model routing.
- docs/agent-execute.md:91 through docs/agent-execute.md:93 says ResolveRoute is debug/status-only and must not feed route choices back into execution.

PROPOSED FIX
Upgrade `github.com/easel/fizeau` to v0.12.2 in `cli/go.mod`/`cli/go.sum`, resolve any API changes in the DDx agent-service boundary, and add focused regression tests around DDx's routing contract. The implementation should prove that unpinned `ddx work`/`ddx try` requests leave harness/provider/model empty for Fizeau to auto-route, explicit --harness/--provider/--model/--profile flags still pass through unchanged, review routing remains separately configurable, and local provider configuration is not treated as a default implementation route before validation work is complete. Keep routinglint green: no DDx-side model catalog, profile ladder, fuzzy model matching, provider fallback, or execution-time ResolveRoute selection should be introduced.

NON-SCOPE
- Do not implement local provider validation in this bead.
- Do not redesign DDx routing configuration or reintroduce retired model_overrides/profile_ladders/default_harness behavior.
- Do not change active worker process parameters or user subscription configuration.
- Do not make broad unrelated queue, lifecycle, or escalation changes.

Parent: none.
Dependencies: none.
    </description>
    <acceptance>
1. `cli/go.mod` pins `github.com/easel/fizeau v0.12.2` and `cli/go.sum` is updated only as required by the dependency upgrade.
2. Add or update a focused test named `TestFizeauAutoRoutingDefaultWorkRequestLeavesRouteUnpinned` proving the zero-config work/try path leaves harness, provider, model, and profile unpinned while preserving MinPower/MaxPower for Fizeau.
3. Add or update a focused test named `TestFizeauAutoRoutingExplicitPinsRemainPassthrough` proving explicit --harness, --provider, --model, --profile, --review-harness, and --review-model values are forwarded unchanged.
4. Add or update a focused test named `TestFizeauAutoRoutingLocalProvidersNotDefaultBeforeValidation` proving local provider configuration alone does not become the default implementation route when no explicit provider/model/profile is requested.
5. `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run 'TestFizeauAutoRouting|TestZeroConfig|TestWork|TestTry'` passes.
6. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestFizeauAutoRouting|Test.*Routing|Test.*Profile|Test.*Dispatch|Test.*Power|TestZeroConfig|TestAgentRunner'` passes.
7. `cd cli && go test ./internal/config -run 'TestFizeauAutoRouting|Test.*Routing|Test.*Passthrough|Test.*Config'` passes.
8. `cd cli && go test ./tools/lint/routinglint/...` passes and confirms no execution-time DDx-owned routing logic was added.
9. `cd cli && go test ./...` passes.
10. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
    </acceptance>
    <labels>phase:iterate, area:agent, area:routing, kind:integration, kind:dependency, spec:FEAT-006, spec:FEAT-010, spec:ADR-024, spec:TP-020</labels>
    <metadata base-rev="5bac23dfa2bda1f93a8af0ec93bd090807ee0f60" bundle=".ddx/executions/20260512T233640-c9a51260"/>
  </bead>
  <governing>
    <note>No governing references were pre-resolved. The bead description above is the primary contract. If it names files, specs, or prior beads, read those before editing. Ground decisions in what is already in the repository; do not guess.</note>
  </governing>
</execute-bead>

data.output:
Upgraded Fizeau to `v0.12.2` in [`cli/go.mod`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-c4ed5aad-20260512T233640-c9a51260/cli/go.mod) and refreshed [`cli/go.sum`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-c4ed5aad-20260512T233640-c9a51260/cli/go.sum).

Added the local-provider regression in [`cli/internal/config/resolved_test.go`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-c4ed5aad-20260512T233640-c9a51260/cli/internal/config/resolved_test.go) as `TestFizeauAutoRoutingLocalProvidersNotDefaultBeforeValidation`.

The routing-contract tests for:
- `TestFizeauAutoRoutingDefaultWorkRequestLeavesRouteUnpinned`
- `TestFizeauAutoRoutingExplicitPinsRemainPassthrough`

are present in [`cli/internal/agent/passthrough_envelope_test.go`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-c4ed5aad-20260512T233640-c9a51260/cli/internal/agent/passthrough_envelope_test.go) and were exercised during verification.

Verification passed:
- `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run 'TestFizeauAutoRouting|TestZeroConfig|TestWork|TestTry'`
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestFizeauAutoRouting|Test.*Routing|Test.*Profile|Test.*Dispatch|Test.*Power|TestZeroConfig|TestAgentRunner'`
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/config -run 'TestFizeauAutoRouting|Test.*Routing|Test.*Passthrough|Test.*Config'`
- `cd cli && go test ./tools/lint/routinglint/...`
- `cd cli && go test ./...`
- `lefthook run pre-commit`

Commit: `c451c319c fix: upgrade Fizeau auto-routing contract [ddx-c4ed5aad]`
